# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-socket-pod
  labels:
    app: docker-socket
spec:
  containers:
  - name: docker
    image: docker:latest
    command:
      - sleep
      - "3600"
    volumeMounts:
      - name: docker-socket
        mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
    - name: docker-socket
      hostPath:
        path: /var/run/docker.sock
  securityContext:
    fsGroup: 65534
    runAsUser: 0
    runAsGroup: 0
  serviceAccountName: privileged-service-account
  restartPolicy: Never
